No Poverty.reason: The 'Enclosure movement' and 'The Deserted Village' explicitly address historical poverty and loss of land rights, aligning with Target 1.4.

Zero Hunger.reason: The 'Enclosure movement' has an inferred link to historical food production systems and rural displacement, touching on Target 2.3.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Discussion of 'powerful feelings' and 'culture of sensibility' offers a minimal, tangential link to mental well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly fosters critical judgment and understanding diverse cultural perspectives (Target 4.7).
evidence: To trace the historical and cultural transformations
